BackstoryDef.title: talisman Daoist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] devoted years to the study of talisman arts, drawing sigils with cinnabar and chanting incantations to ward off evil and cure illness for common folk. [PAWN_nameDef] sought neither fame nor fortune, only peace under heaven.

BackstoryDef.title: alchemy Daoist
BackstoryDef.description: Focusing intently on alchemy, [PAWN_nameDef] became deeply familiar with the nature of herbs and minerals. [PAWN_pronoun] could craft both fortifying elixirs and medicinal remedies. As alchemy demands long hours, [PAWN_pronoun] often remained by the furnace in seclusion, indifferent to the passage of days.

BackstoryDef.title: Daoist lecturer
BackstoryDef.description: As cultivation deepened, [PAWN_nameDef] was entrusted with teaching duties. Each day, [PAWN_pronoun] lectured in the hall, explaining self-cultivation and karmic consequence to villagers. Though not the strongest in battle, [PAWN_nameDef] earned widespread respect.

BackstoryDef.title: wandering Daoist
BackstoryDef.description: Leaving the mountain sect behind, [PAWN_nameDef] traveled far and wide. Practicing medicine, spreading teachings, and aiding others, [PAWN_pronoun] met all kinds of people along the way. The journey across forests and wastelands served as both cultivation and trial.

BackstoryDef.title: talisman Daoist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] devoted years to the study of talisman arts, drawing sigils with cinnabar and chanting incantations to ward off evil and cure illness for common folk. [PAWN_nameDef] sought neither fame nor fortune, only peace under heaven.
